feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Product Bundle usage in Service contract SC1
entry.content:
Dear All,

In our Machining Solution Business, we have a Service Contract process that Our Contract is a bundle of several contract items.

Example: Platinum Contract have 1. Annual maintenance for 5 Years, Priority Service for next 2 years, Free Inspection every 3 months, 24/7 Support for next 1 year.

We have created this as a product bundle in SAP namely Service_Platinum.

Now, the requirement is to enter the Product Bundle as higher level item in Service contract and expectation is that the BOM should be exploded and show the sub items.

Relevant Configurations in Item Categories 'BOM Explosion' checked and Item Category determination is done accordingly to populate the Main item and Sub item. Still the Sub item is not auto populated.

So, Would like to check with you experts if the Product bundle in the Service contract is applicable for SC1 Contract type?

We did not consider Service Contract template since Our contracts are created from Solution Quotation. We cannot able link the Service contract template in Solution quotation for our Contract item. 

Request your guidance. Many thanks.

Girish

entry.title: SAP Subscription Billing S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a customer that has SAP Subscription Billing, S/4HANA Public Cloud solution in place. 

For the integration part they have Salesforce integration with SAP Subscription Billing and S/4.

One clarification I have here is we are facing lot of challenges with SAP Subscription Billing having Event Broker, replication issues in place and customer wants to go live in a couple of months which is not realistic to happen for these issues to be resolved.

The products that this customer have has all the subscription services they do but is there a way we can skip using Subscription Billing and directly create Subscriptions using API calls in S/4? First question is, is this possible and second question is how to approach this subscriptions items till invoicing? Because I tried by creating a sales order or sales contract, but system didn't allow because there was no assigned combination of item category maintained for the subscription items.

Please advise on the above. @stefan_kiene @shpresimshabaj 

SAP Subscription Billing SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks,

Brinda S

entry.title: Freely definable attributes in Customer master (KATR1-KATR10)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using SAP S/4 Public Cloud Edition and customer wanted to maintain their current system account ID in any one of the customer master data fields available in SAP Business Partner, I know that there are 10 freely defined attributes can be configured, but what is the length of these attribute value? Customer has account ID which is maximum of 30 characters. Is it possible to use these attribute fields for this?

Please advise.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA business partner SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales 

Thanks!

entry.title: fiscal year variant VD is not defined for calendar year 1900 Message No. fgv002
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Recently we've done upgrade from 1809 to 2022.

Encountered error in Q4H “Fiscal Year Variant VD is not defined for calendar year 1900 message no. FGV002” during F-90, AW01N and /AGRI/FMCO88 posting for Bearer AUCs.

We've never faced error in Q41. Kindly let us know the solution on this on upgraded system Q4H.

entry.title: PO line item wise mass conditon update
Question about how to post odata api using build apps
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm creating a application on build apps,trying to get the data from excel file and transfer those data to s4hana using odata api_sales_order_srv.

I've successfully create the btp connection and also make a get request using the api.

But when i try to post those data, i got error like "Enter a document number between 0005000000 and 0005999999". I followed this page to create the post body.(Try Out | Sales Order (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub)

I'm wondering how to deal with this error since the data entity do not have a "doucument number" column.

Hope to get some help.Thanks in advance

entry.title: How can we have the all options in the Fiori App MM12?
entry.content:
Dear all

I face a problem.

The options under MM12 in the APP Fiori are not available.

When I want to paste a list of material to implemented the date change in MM12 under Fiori app, I don't have the option. The sytem only let me to paste material one by one.

Is there an action to do to have the same behaviour as on the MM12? Do we have an app that permite to schedule the change in the material master in mass mode?

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: BP - ADD TAX CATEGORY
entry.content: Our requirement  is how to check mandatory field in BP ( S4 Hana) tax category - GSTIN Feild- Control data tab  )

entry.title: How to add new fields into line item for an Manage sales order app in s/4 hana
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Greetings,

For one of requirement, I need to add new fields into Line Items of SAP Manage sales order app.
May I know how do I achieve this either using developer extensibility or classic extensibility.?

if developer extensibility I tried adding new fields they are placing at custom fields tab, but I need those fields into line-Item table.

 

Regards,
Hiriyappa

entry.title: How do we send the PO Output to Partner Type LS instead of Partner Type LI on SAP S/4 HANA?
entry.content: Hello Experts, we are implementing SAP S/4 HANA. The customer does not want to maintain each and every vendor as a Partner under Partner Type for Purchase Order output. How do we send the PO Output to Partner Type LS instead of Partner Type LI on SAP S/4 HANA when we create PO using ME21N?

entry.title: What are the best approach to store/replicate historical data and when Delta merge fails? (SLT)
entry.content: Currently we are replicating data form S/4 to BW/4 HANA system using SLT(using Delta merge). But we are facing issue while replicating ACDOCA data due to huge volume of data (using SLT Delta Merge). What are the best approaches to store/replicate historical data and when Delta merge fails

entry.title: 0FI_ACDOCA_10: Carryforward figures have RCLNT(client) blank in some 0FI_ACDOCA_10 extracted records
entry.content:
Hi,

Recently we did year end carryforward transaction which create carryforward figures in FISCYEARPER = 000.2024 in ACDOCA; such transactions have period = 000. In SAP table, the records have RCLNT (client) field populated which is correct. However, when we extract to the destination (we are using Databricks Lakehouse) using 0FI_ACDOCA_10 data source, some of the records of 000.2024 have missing RCLNT value, but there are some with RCLNT value.

A few questions (if anyone can answer any of the questions, good to post and enlighten me; no need to have answers to all)

1. How do I check what is extracted from SAP (within SAP itself) because it was early May that this was encountered but in ODQMON I no longer see the extraction record (likely it has been cleaned up)?

2. Is there a way I can simulate what was being extracted. I tried RSA3 but the display of records don't show RCLNT field

3. Anyone encountered the same problem and managed to resolve? Can please enlighten?

4. Is there a way I can retrigger the same records out and see what is being extracted without affecting the existing delta records extractions?

Thanks alot!

entry.title: SEPA SDD ITALY with schema CBIBdySDDReq.00.01.01
entry.content:
Hello,

usually in Italy or SEPA SDD we implement the schema CBISDDReqLogMsg.00.01.01, which is also described in OSS note 2253571.

One of our customers requires the implementation of the schema CBIBdySDDReq.00.01.01, where the schema CBISDDReqLogMsg.00.01.01 is embeded.

 

Do you have any suggestion / guide for the implemetation of the new schema CBIBdySDDReq.00.01.01 ? Because in SAP I didn't find the corresponding XML for the import in the DMEE tree.

 

Thank you!

Michele

entry.title: letter of credit - which position management procedure is the relevant one?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I want to activate letter of credit procedure  (product type 85A) in my S/4HANA 1909 system. In the standard customizing the link to accounting needs to be customized. When it comes to the assignment of the position management procedure I am unsecure, which is the right one to take.

In Customizing under Treasury and Risk Management > Transaction Manager > General Settings > Accounting > Settings for Position Management > Assign Position Management Procedure

I have the following options:

1000 SE/Loan: Mark-to-Market (P/L) / Amortization (SAC Net)
1001 Sec./Loan: MtM (P/L)/Amort. SAC Net Separate Position Costs
1010 SE/LO: Mark-to-Market (OCI) / Amortization (SAC Gross)
1020 German HGB: Bond Issue
1030 IAS/IFRS/US GAAP: Bond Issue
2000 SE/LO/MM: Write up to Purchase Value (Without Amort.)
2500 Money Market: Mark-to-Market (FX / P/L)
2501 Money Market: Mark-to-Market (FX / P/L) (Asset)
2502 Money Market: Mark-to-Market (FX / P/L) (Liability)
2600 Money Market: Mark-to-Market ("Security", FX, P/L)
2700 Facility: No Valuation
3000 Derivatives: Hedging Instr., Hedge Acctng (Forex & Sec.Val.)
3001 Forex Trans.: Hedging Instr., Hedge Acctng (Mark-to-Market)
3002 Money Market Transactions: Underlying, Hedge Accounting
3003 Money Market Transactions: Hedging Instr., Hedge Acctng
3004 Forex Trans.: Hedging Instr., Hedge Acctg (Spot/Spot & Swap)
3100 Forward Securities Transactions: Mark-to-Market
3500 Forward Exchange Transactions: Mark-to-Market
3600
4000 Forward Exchange Transactions: Spot/Spot
5000 Index-Linked Bonds: Mark-to-Market (P/L) / Amort. (SAC Net)
6000 Listed Options and Futures: Mark-to-Market
7000 OTC Derivatives: Mark-to-Market
7100 OTC Options: Mark-to-Market (2-Step/OCI)
7200 OTC Options: Mark-to-Market (2-Step/OCI) Transfer Underlying
7300 OTC Derivatives: No Valuation
7315 FLP with Physical Delivery-HGB (Write-up to Purchase Value)

7316 FLP with Physical Delivery-IFRS (Mark to Market)
7317 FLP with no valuation
7400 OTC Deriv.: Mark-to-Market (Asset/Liab. Balance Sheet Accts)
7500 OTC Deriv.: Mark-to-Market (Asset/Liab. Balance Sheet Accts)
8000 Standard Repo
9979 -------Securities/Loans - IAS (Templates)-------
9980 IAS/AFS: Amort. SAC Net / FX Val. (P/L), Sec.Val. (Equ.Cap.)
9981 IAS/AFS: FX Val.(Equity Cap.), Sec.Val.(Equity Cap.)
9983 IAS/TRA: No Amort. / FX (P/L), Security (P/L)
9984 IAS/HTM: Amort. SAC Net / FX Val. Only (P/L)
9985 IAS/HTM: No Amort. / FX Val. Only (P/L)
9986 IAS/AFS: Amort. Const. Eff.Int.Rate /Security (OCI)/FX (P/L)
9989 ------ Securities/Loans - US GAAP (Templates) -------
9990 US/AFS: Amort.SAC Gross / FX Val.(Eq.Cap), Sec.Val.(Equ.Cap)
9991 US/AFS: No Amort. / FX Val. (Equ.Cap), Sec. Val. (Equ.Cap)
9992 US/TRA: Amort. SAC Gross / FX (Equity Cap.), Security (P/L)
9993 US/TRA: No Amort. / FX (Equity Cap.), Security (P/L)
9994 US/HTM: Amort. SAC Gross / FX Val. Only (Equity Cap.)
9995 US/HTM: No Amort. / FX Val. Only (Equity Cap.)
9996 US/AFS: Amort with Delayed Effect.Int./ Sec.(OCI)/Forex(P/L)
9997 US/FASB91: Retrospective Amortization ABS/MBS

Which one is the procedure for letter of credit? How have you solved this in your system?

Thank you for your help,

Peter

entry.title: BOM REQUIREMENT
entry.content: We noticed that the bill of materials requirements in a production order were incorrect. It requires more than the required amount. When we checked the main data, additional data and product tree of the material, we saw that the correct quantities were included, but the requirements in the work order do not appear correct. Is there another area I should check? Is there anyone who can help?

entry.title: S4hana Server Installation Error
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have installed a HANA database, with AFL, and EML and EPM. Now I'm trying to install the Application Server, but I'm encountering this error message. Can anyone help me with this?

I 'm getting this error in swpm:

Error

An error occurred while processing option System SID (SAP S/4HANA 2023) > SAP S/4HANA Server 2023 > SAP HANA Database > Installation > Application Server ABAP > Standard System > Standard System (Last error reported by the step: Error during execution of HdbCmdClazz 'INSTALL_HANA_COMPONENT' : class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.CmdClazzParameterFactory, parameters received. Start execution. Check HdbCmdOut.log and HdbStdout.txt for further information.Use Java process call.Execute command: /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm --action=update_components --batch --read_password_from_stdin=xml --component_root=/usr/sap/SID/HDB00/components --components=sap_afl_sdk_aplCannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)Thu May 23 15:10:46 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Cannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)). You can now:

  • Choose Retry
    to repeat the current step.
  • Choose Log Files
    to get more information about the error.
  • Stop the option and continue later.

Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP.

HdbCmdOut.log

Start new command section
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.core.jar | Changelist: 211336 | Release: lmts_026_REL | API-Version: 00
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.jar | Changelist: 213207 | Release: lmts_026_REL | API-Version: 35
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcDriver | URI: file:/tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP/ngdbc.jar
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Adding connect property: encrypt=true
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Adding connect property: validateCertificate=false
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Instance is a multiple-container system.
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Start new connection with connect URL: jdbc:sap://hostname:30013/?databaseName=SID connect user: SYSTEM
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.user.password.HdbPassword | Configured password_layout is: A1a, minimum password length: 8
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Name of HdbCmdClazz: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent | Updating HANA component(s) locally: sap_afl_sdk_apl
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm | Use Java process call.
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm | Execute command: /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm --action=update_components --batch --read_password_from_stdin=xml --component_root=/usr/sap/SID/HDB00/components --components=sap_afl_sdk_apl
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm | Cannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Error during execution of HdbCmdClazz section!
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Cannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.operating.system.ExternalProcess.exec(ExternalProcess.java:185)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.operating.system.ExternalProcess.exec(ExternalProcess.java:127)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.operating.system.ExternalProcess.execute(ExternalProcess.java:86)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm.updateComponent(HdbLcm.java:151)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent.installComponentLocally(InstallHanaComponent.java:879)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent.execute(InstallHanaComponent.java:857)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain.execute(HdbCmdMain.java:113)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain.main(HdbCmdMain.java:74)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Closing connection: jdbc:sap://hostname:30013/?databaseName=SID Connect user: SYSTEM
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | *************************************************************

Thank you very much.

Best Regards

entry.title: smartforms打印不出䓬这个汉字
CVI synchronisation - customer converted to BP but contact person not.
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in a CVI synchronisation project in preparation for the transformation from ECC to S/4HANA. We were able to convert the customers and vendors to business partners. The contact persons of the vendors could be created correctly. However, it does not create the contact persons for the customers. When we run the CVI Load Tool, the message appears that the business partner for the customer has already been created and the programme does not continue. Is there a separate programme that can be used to create contact persons or does anyone have any ideas on how we can solve the problem?

Thank you.

entry.title: Activate a new depreciation area - how to handle historical data
entry.content:
After we migrated to S4, we came to realize that posting to each depreciation area on the asset is driven by accounting principle config in OADB. Our AUCs were set up to have only depreciation area 01 (ledger 1) while final asset is set up to have both depreciation area 01 (ledger 1) and depreciation area 02 (ledger 2). So when we settle from the AUC to the final asset, we would be missing the area 02 posting. With that being said, we decide to activate depreciation area 02 on our AUCs. But that would only work for going forward basis. How do we handle historical data? 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ICMR: Adjustment Postings
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am currently working through the design of ICMR and have had a few questions in relation to the adjustment posting functionality that I was hoping to open up a discussion on.

Adjustment Target/Offsetting Account: When setting up adjustment postings based on matching method SF104 (AR/AP entry view), posting rule SA001 contains an adjustment target (12302000) and offsetting account (11002030) - no description is available but both are identified as balance sheet accounts. Is it a generally followed approach to have both of the GL accounts be balance sheet (asset) accounts when we are looking to make an adjustment on the AR (leading unit) side? So far I have seen mixed examples across other blogs with some being both assets (same as SAP example) and others being an asset G/L (target) and revenue G/L (offsetting) combination.

Rematching in Next Period: Upon posting an adjustment, I have read that standard practice is for a reversal entry to be generated (and this is maintained within the posting rule). When defining the reason codes associated with auto adjustments, I am wondering if it is common for these reason codes to be set up with the "temporary resolution" selection and for documents to be rematched in the next period? My thinking is that they should be rematched as an additional invoice may come in the next month, allowing for the system to generate an exact match assignment, however I am trying to understand the case for/against this as standard reason codes S13 and S15 both do not have this option selected.

Looking forward to discussing!
